preamble: The merger of the retroflex affricate [ʈʂ] into the alveolar affricate [ts] is a widespread feature in Southern Mandarin dialects and Taiwanese Mandarin, often termed 'de-retroflexion'.

examples.note: Common merger in casual speech and among speakers with a Min Nan substrate.
Widespread de-retroflexion across various southern provinces.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
